panels.title: Direct Tool Calls
panels.description: All direct tool calls (source='direct'). Filter by Tool or Runner; '' means All. Sorted newest-first.

targets.rawSql: SELECT started_at, tool_name, runner_id, session_id, duration_ms, params_bytes, response_bytes, substring(params, 1, 200) AS params_preview, coalesce(error_code, '') AS error_code, coalesce(error_message, '') AS error FROM ploston.tool_calls WHERE source = 'direct' AND $__timeFilter(started_at) AND ('$tool_name' = '' OR tool_name = '$tool_name') AND ('$runner_id' = '' OR runner_id = '$runner_id') ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 1000

panels.title: Errors — direct tool calls (always shown)
panels.description: Tool calls with non-empty error_code. Tool/Runner filters apply.

targets.rawSql: SELECT started_at, tool_name, runner_id, session_id, duration_ms, error_code, error_message FROM ploston.tool_calls WHERE source = 'direct' AND error_code IS NOT NULL AND error_code != '' AND $__timeFilter(started_at) AND ('$tool_name' = '' OR tool_name = '$tool_name') AND ('$runner_id' = '' OR runner_id = '$runner_id') ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 500

list.name: tool_name
list.label: Tool
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT tool_name FROM ploston.tool_calls WHERE source='direct' ORDER BY tool_name

list.name: runner_id
list.label: Runner
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT runner_id FROM ploston.tool_calls WHERE source='direct' AND runner_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY runner_id
